//: ext-showcase: FIVE external-agent reactions in one combined replay (see NOTES.md for the
//1: full calibration/verification numbers). All positions calibrated against each car's own
//2: free-flow baseline (a throwaway --agents-less Sim.ExtDemo pass), mirroring how

agents.//: STOP (B1): car_stop cruises free at 13.89 m/s; ped_stop is a comfortably-stoppable
agents.//1: full-lane block (width 0) that appears at t=8, ~40 m ahead of the car (pos 150 vs car
agents.//2: pos ~108 at t=8) -- far enough to brake smoothly to a Krauss steady-gap stop, not a
agents.//3: swerve trigger. Clears at t=16, well before car_swerve/car_spill reach this position.

agents.//: SWERVE (B6): car_swerve (depart t=35) is at pos 177.90 at t=50 (local elapsed 15,
agents.//1: matching RungB6's OneLaneDir calibration exactly). ped_swerve jumps in 8 m ahead
agents.//2: (185.9), hugging the right edge (latPos -1.2, width 0.8 -> footprint [-1.6,-0.8]),
agents.//3: too close to stop -> the car swerves LEFT within the 3.2 m lane and passes. Clears at
agents.//4: t=60, long before car_spill (departs t=70) reaches this position.

agents.//: SPILL (B6): car_spill (depart t=70) is at pos 177.90 at t=85 (local elapsed 15, same
agents.//1: calibration point as the swerve car). ped_spill LANE-FILLS WJ_0 (width 2.8 on the
agents.//2: 3.2 m lane -- only 0.2 m slack per side, not enough to swerve within-lane) 8 m ahead,
agents.//3: too close to stop -> the car spills LEFT into the empty adjacent lane WJ_1 and passes.
agents.//4: Clears at t=100, long before car_follow (departs t=105) reaches this position.

agents.//: FOLLOW (B5-i): a slow external car jumps onto WJ_0 at pos 100 at t=100, five seconds
agents.//1: before car_follow departs (t=105, from rest at pos 0), rolling at a constant 3.0 m/s.
agents.//2: car_follow accelerates, closes the gap, and settles in behind it at ~3.0 m/s.

agents.//: JUNCTION YIELD (B5-iii): a crossing agent occupies the major through movement's
agents.//1: internal lane :J_1_0 (WJ->JE straight, lane 0 -- one of the links junction request
agents.//2: index=3 (SJ->JN, vMinor's own link, internal :J_3_0) responds to per its
agents.//3: response="00111" row, which sets bits for links 0/1/2 = :J_0_0, :J_1_0, :J_1_1). While
agents.//4: active, vMinor must yield/hold at its SJ_0 stop line; once it clears (t=20), vMinor
